final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a domestic Chinese fundraising roadshow PPT cover announcing "GPT-5.5" release, featuring speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: Chinese tech startup pitch deck aesthetic, clean corporate presentation design, Tencent/ByteDance investor deck style
Composition: centered layout with ample white space, headline at top third, speaker name and title at bottom third, balanced for 16:9 presentation slide
Subject: "GPT-5.5" as the hero headline in bold Chinese typography, subtle AI neural network motif as background texture
Scene/backdrop: minimalist gradient background transitioning from deep tech blue to clean white, subtle geometric grid pattern suggesting data/AI
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting, professional and confident atmosphere suitable for GP/investor audience
Color palette: dominant tech blue (#0066FF) as primary, clean white as negative space, gold or orange accent for emphasis points
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5发布"
Constraints: must work as PPT cover slide; text must be legible when projected; design must feel trustworthy for institutional investors
Avoid: 3D renders; cartoon mascots; cluttered layouts; Western Silicon Valley clichés (hoodies, bean bags); generic startup stock photos
